name: zvideo_fxpass3_queue_primitive
description: zVideo::FxPass3_QueuePrimitive forwards a primitive surface tuple to the global pass-3 FX config.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4bef50 validates the fastcall wrapper that forwards primitive, width, height, and pitchBytes to zVideoFxPass3Config::QueuePrimitiveRaw with this=&g_zVideo_FxPass3ConfigLocal.

The native postprocess smoke reaches zVideo::FxPass3_QueuePrimitive through zVideo::RunPostprocessOnSwBuffer and verifies the queued primitive pixels, width, height, and pitch fields in g_zVideo_FxPass3ConfigLocal.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?FxPass3_QueuePrimitive@zVideo@@YIXPAXHHH@Z at 0x4bef50 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; 7 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
